Class FinancialGoal

java.lang.Object
Goals.FinancialGoal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FinancialGoal extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a financial goal set by a user.

Tracks a target amount to save, current contributions, and a deadline.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    FinancialGoal()
    Constructs a new FinancialGoal with zero initial contribution.

  • Constructor Details

    • FinancialGoal

      public FinancialGoal()
      Constructs a new FinancialGoal with zero initial contribution.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public void create()
      Confirms the creation of the goal to the console.

    • addContribution

      public void addContribution(BigDecimal amount)
      Adds money to the goal's current amount and updates status.

      If the goal's target is reached, the status is changed to "COMPLETED".

      Parameters:
      amount - the positive amount to contribute

    • calcRemaining

      public BigDecimal calcRemaining()
      Calculates how much more money is needed to reach the target.
      Returns:
      the remaining amount, or 0 if reached

    • getGoalID

      public int getGoalID()
      Returns:
      the goal ID

    • setGoalID

      public void setGoalID(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - the new goal ID

    • getGoalId

      public int getGoalId()
      Returns:
      the goal ID

    • setGoalId

      public void setGoalId(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - the new goal ID

    • getUserID

      public int getUserID()
      Returns:
      the owning user ID

    • setUserID

      public void setUserID(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - the owning user ID

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      the name of the goal

    • setName

      public void setName(String n)
      Parameters:
      n - the name of the goal

    • getTargetAmount

      public BigDecimal getTargetAmount()
      Returns:
      the overall target amount to save

    • setTargetAmount

      public void setTargetAmount(BigDecimal a)
      Parameters:
      a - the overall target amount to save

    • getCurrentAmount

      public BigDecimal getCurrentAmount()
      Returns:
      the amount currently saved

    • setCurrentAmount

      public void setCurrentAmount(BigDecimal a)
      Parameters:
      a - the amount currently saved

    • getDeadline

      public Date getDeadline()
      Returns:
      the target deadline date

    • setDeadline

      public void setDeadline(Date d)
      Parameters:
      d - the target deadline date

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns:
      the current status ("IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED")

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String s)
      Parameters:
      s - the new status

    • getMonthlySaving

      public BigDecimal getMonthlySaving()
      Returns:
      the monthly saving target (if calculated)

    • setMonthlySaving

      public void setMonthlySaving(BigDecimal m)
      Parameters:
      m - the monthly saving target
